{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/235199066?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dodge1218", "id": 235199066, "login": "dodge1218", "node_id": "U_kgDODgTaWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dodge1218", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-346", "name": "Origin Validation Error"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "## Impact

Uni-CLI versions before 0.225.2 exposed the legacy JSON-RPC-over-HTTP MCP transport on loopback without validating browser Origin headers before routing requests. A malicious web page could send a CORS simple POST request, such as text/plain, to the local /mcp endpoint and deliver a JSON-RPC body to the dispatcher. If the user had started the local MCP HTTP transport, that page could drive tools/call requests against the user's local Uni-CLI server.

The Streamable HTTP transport already enforced this browser-to-localhost boundary. The legacy stateless HTTP path did not, so the two HTTP transports had drifted. This issue is about the browser-to-localhost boundary; it does not change Uni-CLI's local-code-execution trust model.

## Patches

Version 0.225.2 fixes the issue by moving the Origin policy into a shared guard and applying it before routing in both HTTP transports. Non-loopback browser Origins are rejected with HTTP 403 before health, OAuth, or /mcp dispatch runs. Non-browser clients that omit Origin remain supported.

## Workarounds

Upgrade to 0.225.2 or later. If upgrading is not immediately possible, do not expose the legacy HTTP MCP transport to browser-originated traffic; use the default stdio transport or the Streamable HTTP transport instead.

## Credits

Reported privately by Ryan Vonbrubeck ([@dodge1218](https://github.com/dodge1218)).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:43:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:43:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/olo-dot-io/Uni-CLI/security/advisories/GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/olo-dot-io/Uni-CLI/security-advisories/GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/olo-dot-io/Uni-CLI", "summary": "Uni-CLI: Legacy HTTP MCP transport accepted browser-originated localhost requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:43:11Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v3f4-w7r7-v3hm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.225.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@zenalexa/unicli"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.225.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Uni-CLI: Legacy HTTP MCP transport accepted browser-originated localhost requests
